_comment: Strong-judge candidates for rubric grading, in priority order. When JUDGE_MODEL is unset, EvalJudgeModel auto-selects the first candidate whose API-key env var is exported (skipping a candidate that IS the run model); when none is reachable it falls back to self-judge with a loud warning. Each modelId is a `provider/name` whose routing prefix MUST match an `EvalRemoteProviderBootstrap.presets` key so the ephemeral in-process provider connects — Gemini's preset is keyed `google` (the app's Google provider), so its model id is `google/<model>`, NOT `gemini/<model>` (the latter has no preset, so the bootstrap skips it and the judge silently never resolves). Override the file location with OSAURUS_EVALS_JUDGES_CONFIG; if the file is missing entirely, EvalJudgeModel falls back to a built-in copy of this list.
